ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2018 Continued To Apr-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2018 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ADRIAN WONG's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Defendant Adrian Wong's demurrer to all three causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Soderquist Law Offices is overruled as to all three causes of action. All three claims are adequately alleged, not uncertain and not necessarily barred by CRPC 3-300. No is there any need for plaintiff to make the retainer agreement an attachment to the complaint for any of the claims to withstand a demurrer.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, mtorreano@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
